political.s: Intuit's corporate PAC contributes to both parties but strategically favors Republicans. In 2024, PAC contributions totaled $781,966 with substantial donations to GOPAC and Republican committees. Intuit spent $3.72 million on federal lobbying in 2024, primarily opposing IRS free tax filing initiatives.

charity.s: Intuit provides charitable giving through employee matching programs and donated $96.8M in product and in-kind donations in FY24 through TechSoup partnership with nonprofits. Employees receive up to 40 hours paid volunteer time annually with company matching up to $5,000 per employee.
charity.amt: $96.8M in-kind donations (FY24); employee matching up to $5K per person
charity.focus: Nonprofits, charities, public libraries; financial inclusion; community partnerships

environment.s: Intuit achieved carbon neutrality in 2015 and met renewable energy goals in 2020. The company targets 2 million metric tonnes of carbon emission reductions by 2030 (50x its operational footprint) and provides Climate Action Marketplace for small businesses with sustainability solutions.

labor.s: Glassdoor reviews indicate mixed employee satisfaction with QuickBooks divisions reporting 4.1/5 stars but lower-than-company-average compensation satisfaction. Concerns include low wages, understaffing, and inconsistent management, though company offers expanded payroll and workforce management features.

dei.s: Intuit has DEI foundational to company values with 14 employee resource groups and appointed its first racial equity director in 2020. Women represent 34%+ of tech roles and 40% of leadership; underrepresented groups comprise 16%+ of US workforce. Company conducts annual pay equity analysis.

animals.s: Not applicable - software and financial services company with no animal testing practices.

guns.s: Not applicable - software and financial services company with no firearms manufacturing or sales.

privacy.s: Intuit states it does not sell personal information and uses industry-standard security practices. However, company shares data with affiliates and third parties for service delivery and uses cookies and tracking technologies. Privacy controls available but practices vary by product.

execPay.s: CEO Sasan Goodarzi earned $36.85M in 2025 (3.5% base, 96.5% performance-based compensation). CEO pay ratio was 182:1 relative to median employee pay in 2024. Executive compensation programs heavily weighted toward stock and performance metrics.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
